candidateClaims.boundary: Examples are not exhaustive. Australian emergency route only; exact wording requires emergency clinical review.
Does not diagnose or exclude sepsis. Reader concern and rapid change remain reasons to seek urgent professional assessment.
Exact route depends on severity, population and local availability; absence of these examples does not establish safety.
Australian infant-specific threshold; must not be generalised and requires paediatric clinical verification before use.
Services and hours can change; emergency symptoms must use emergency pathways rather than telephone or online tools.
